title: Gelonium glomerulatum
taxonomy: Gelonium glomerulatum is classified within the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the madder family. The species is native to tropical Africa and is known to thrive in a variety of environments. Gelonium glomerulatum is often found growing in shaded, humid areas with rich soil. Further classification of the species is at the genus and species levels, which places it within the larger family of Rubiaceae. More specific classification details may require further research or consultation with a botanical expert.
